title: Cleaning system for vineyard pruning valorisation
description: A guide describing an innovative cleaning system for vineyard pruning biomass that uses a two-phase density-based wet separation process to reduce ash content from approximately 20% to below 3%, facilitating its conversion into industrial pellets or baled chips for energy production. It details processing capacity, investment and operating costs, and estimated payback periods for cooperatives, wineries, and biomass suppliers.
